strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and distributed platforms with real-time data handling
Demonstrated hands-on work with agentic workflows and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing frameworks, CI/CD, and technical mentoring
concerns: Lack of explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulated financial environments
No clear evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or establishing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal documentation of production-scale multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops, observability, or model-agnostic design
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and emerging agentic AI tooling, with tangible contributions to AI-agent infrastructure — but lacks demonstrated experience in fintech regulation, credit risk systems, or scaling engineering teams to executive levels required for this role.
